rationale_for_baseline_tier: Severe but localised, non-systemic allergic contact dermatitis — needs prompt prescription (potent topical ± short oral steroid) and allergen advice, with a clear safety-net for systemic allergy/SJS and secondary infection. Not an emergency.

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Facial/mouth swelling, difficulty breathing, or new mouth/eye sores with feeling unwell
escalation_edges.rationale: Signals systemic allergy/airway involvement or SJS/TEN.
escalation_edges.communication_template: If your face or mouth swells, you have trouble breathing, or you get sores in your mouth/eyes with feeling unwell — call 000 or go to the emergency department.

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Thick yellow foul-smelling pus, spreading warmth/redness, or fever
escalation_edges.communication_template: If the blister fluid turns to thick smelly yellow pus, the redness spreads and gets hot, or you develop a fever — get urgent review.

contextual_modifiers.effect_on_advice: Ensure clear written instructions and a low threshold to seek help if systemic features develop overnight.

baseline_safety_net_advice.default_tier_advice: Start the prescribed steroids and antihistamine, use cool compresses instead of scratching, don't pop the blisters, and wash your gardening gear. Watch for facial/mouth swelling, breathing trouble, or pus/fever.
baseline_safety_net_advice.contact_method: GP within days for prescription/review; 000/ED for systemic allergy or airway symptoms
baseline_safety_net_advice.after_hours_advice: After-hours GP for the prescription; ED/000 for facial swelling or breathing difficulty.
baseline_safety_net_advice.documentation_for_gp: Document severe plant ACD with bullae, treatment started, and plan for allergen avoidance/patch testing.

critical_under_triage.failure_description: Simple self-care with no SJS/systemic or infection safety-net.
critical_under_triage.patient_harm_scenario: An evolving systemic allergy/SJS or superinfection is missed.

serious_under_triage.failure_description: Routine handling that leaves extensive blistering ACD under-treated and itch uncontrolled.

moderate_over_triage.failure_description: Emergency escalation for a localised plant contact dermatitis without systemic features.

clinical_uncertainty_handling.key_uncertainty: Cannot inspect mucosae or exclude early SJS/TEN with certainty remotely.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.correct_response_to_uncertainty: Treat as severe ACD with steroids and allergen removal, and give a clear systemic/SJS and infection safety-net.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.wrong_response_to_uncertainty: Either over-escalating for localised ACD, or dismissing without a systemic safety-net.
